task.en: In the Documents folder there is a file named `new-hire.txt`. Open it in TextEdit and read it: it lists a new colleague's first name, last name, company, and work email. Then open the Contacts app and create a single new contact card with those exact four values — first name, last name, company (Organization), and email (use the `work` label or any label). Save the card. Do not create any other contacts.

pre_command:
for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; mkdir -p "$HOME/Documents"; printf 'New Hire Onboarding

First name: Priya
Last name: Ramaswamy
Company: Northwind Analytics
Work email: priya.ramaswamy@northwind-analytics.com

Please add them to our shared contacts.
' > "$HOME/Documents/new-hire.txt"; killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "DELETE FROM ZABCDEMAILADDRESS WHERE ZOWNER IN (SELECT Z_PK FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE ZFIRSTNAME='Priya' AND ZLASTNAME='Ramaswamy'); DELETE FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE ZFIRSTNAME='Priya' AND ZLASTNAME='Ramaswamy'; PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" >/dev/null 2>&1; done
grading_command: killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE Z_ENT=22 AND ZFIRSTNAME='Priya' AND ZLASTNAME='Ramaswamy';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" >/dev/null 2>&1; sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)

killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD WHERE Z_ENT=22 AND ZFIRSTNAME='Priya' AND ZLASTNAME='Ramaswamy' AND ZORGANIZATION='Northwind Analytics';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)

killall Contacts 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ABDIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/AddressBook"; SQL="SELECT count(*) FROM ZABCDRECORD r JOIN ZABCDEMAILADDRESS e ON e.ZOWNER=r.Z_PK WHERE r.Z_ENT=22 AND r.ZFIRSTNAME='Priya' AND r.ZLASTNAME='Ramaswamy' AND lower(e.ZADDRESS)='priya.ramaswamy@northwind-analytics.com';"; find "$ABDIR" -name '*.abcddb' 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r D; do sqlite3 "$D" "$SQL" 2>/dev/null; done | (S=0; while read n; do S=$((S+${n:-0})); done; [ "$S" -ge 1 ] && echo True || echo False)
